items.line_en: Hi, how are you? I am good. Thanks. How about you?

coach.say: Hi, how are you? I am good. Thanks. How about you?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hi, how are you? / I am good. Thanks. How about you?

items.line_en: I am doing well. Did you have a chance to review the gender formatting?

coach.say: I am doing well. Did you have a chance to review the gender formatting?
coach.hint: Chunk it: I am doing well. / Did you have a chance to review the gender formatting?

items.line_en: Yes, I went to it. Look like we have quite a few topics to cover.

coach.say: Yes, I went to it. Look like we have quite a few topics to cover.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yes, / I went to it. / Look like we have quite a few topics to cover.

items.line_en: That's right. I think we should start with the project update first. Any progress on your end?

coach.say: That's right. I think we should start with the project update first. Any progress on your end?
coach.hint: Chunk it: That's right. / I think we should start with the project update first. / Any progress on your end?

items.line_en: Yes, I have made some significant headway and should be able to share the latest developments.

coach.say: Yes, I have made some significant headway and should be able to share the latest developments.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yes, / I have made some significant headway and should be able to share the latest developments.

items.line_en: Great. I am looking forward to hearing about it. We also need to discuss the upcoming marketing campaign.

coach.say: Great. I am looking forward to hearing about it. We also need to discuss the upcoming marketing campaign.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Great. / I am looking forward to hearing about it. / We also need to discuss the upcoming marketing campaign.
Chunk it: Have you prepared any ideas?

items.line_en: Absolutely. I have a few concepts I would like to present and get your feedback on.

coach.say: Absolutely. I have a few concepts I would like to present and get your feedback on.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Absolutely. / I have a few concepts I would like to present and get your feedback on.

items.line_en: Excellent. We can allocate some time during the meeting to go over those lastly.

coach.say: Excellent. We can allocate some time during the meeting to go over those lastly.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Excellent. / We can allocate some time during the meeting to go over those lastly.

items.line_en: We should touch this on the budget for the next quarter. Do you have the latest figures?

coach.say: We should touch this on the budget for the next quarter. Do you have the latest figures?
coach.hint: Chunk it: We should touch this on the budget for the next quarter. / Do you have the latest figures?

items.line_en: Yes, I have crushed the numbers and can provide an overview of our financial projects.

coach.hint: Chunk it: Yes, / I have crushed the numbers and can provide an overview of our financial projects.

items.line_en: Perfect. Let's make sure to cover all these topics and leave some time for open discussion.

coach.say: Perfect. Let's make sure to cover all these topics and leave some time for open discussion.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Perfect. / Let's make sure to cover all these topics and leave some time for open discussion.

items.line_en: The meeting is scheduled for tomorrow at 10am.

coach.say: The meeting is scheduled for tomorrow at 10am.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The meeting is scheduled for tomorrow at 10am.

items.line_en: Sound good. I will come prepared with the necessary updates and information.
